bodyTextStart: Skip to main content PROOFOUND How it works For individuals For organizations Sign in Request a pilot Proof behind the claim Proofound turns real work into structured Proof Packs for privacy-safe hiring review before identity takes over. Proof portfolios for individuals. Evidence-based review for teams. Request a pilot Create your proof portfolio Blind by default Photo, name, contact details, prestige markers, and other identity signals are removed first. The goal is not anonymity for its own sake. It is capability before bias. Weak signal should leave before judgment begins. 01 / 09 Blind by default THE STORY RESOLVES INTO ACTION Build hirin
label: landing
title: Proofound | Proof Behind the Claim

Processing is performed under applicable privacy laws, including GDPR and ePrivacy rules. 2. Data We Process Account records: email, display name, authentication identifiers. bodyTextStart: Skip to main content PROOFOUND Cookie Policy Proofound uses strictly necessary cookies by default and optional analytics cookies only with your consent. Effective date: 2026-02-12 · Version: v1.1.2026-02-12 Necessary cookies support authentication, security, and core platform functionality. These cannot be switched off. Analytics cookies are optional. We only activate non-essential telemetry after explicit consent. You can withdraw or change your preferences at any time. We do not use third-party advertising cookies and we do not sell personal data. Cookie retention and purpose are reviewed regularly to keep processing proportional to platfor
label: cookies
title: Cookie Policy | How Proofound handles cookie consent

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Return to previous page Proofound Cookie Settings Manage your cookie preferences to control how we collect and use your data. Your choices help us respect your privacy while improving your experience. Your Privacy Matters: We are committed to protecting your data under GDPR regulations. You can change these settings at any time. Essential cookies are required for the site to function and cannot be disabled. Accept All Reject All (Essential Only) Essential Cookies (Always Active) Required for authentication and core functionality. These cookies are necessary for the website to work and cannot be disabled. Toggle Essential

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Sign in Start Proof behind the claim Proofound turns real work into structured Proof Packs for privacy-safe hiring review before identity takes over. Request a pilot Create your proof portfolio 02 Real outcomes, not bullet points Vague summaries and floating skill lists resolve into structured outcomes, work scope, ownership, and context. Skills stop existing as decoration and start living next to real work. Senior Operations Professional OUTCOME SIGNAL PROOF SNAPSHOT Reviewable 12 Team 200+ Scale 31% Outcome Outcome record, artifacts, and trust method stay together. Work scope Ownership Context 03 Verification trust laye
